{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Horizon's form
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon's form]] changed to include an outfit resembling battle armor and horns that were blades of hammered [[steel]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
